name: Loan Application-vk_borrower_bank
label: Borrower Bank (Employer Bank)
description: Employer bank of the borrower. Used to resolve payday date via the Payday Calendar.

name: Loan Application-vk_net_salary
label: Net Monthly Salary
description: Borrower's net monthly take-home after all deductions.

name: Loan Application-vk_existing_liabilities
label: Existing Loan Liabilities
description: Total existing loan deductions at the borrower's bank.

name: Loan Application-vk_max_eligible_amount
label: Maximum Eligible Amount
description: (net_salary × 50%) − existing_liabilities. Auto-computed on submit.

name: Loan Application-vk_payday_date
label: Resolved Payday Date
description: Auto-resolved from Payday Calendar on submit. This becomes the loan due date.

name: Loan Application-vk_framework_agreement
label: Framework Agreement
description: Active framework agreement for this borrower. If Active, borrower skips re-signing.

name: Loan Application-vk_appraisal
label: Loan Appraisal
description: Linked appraisal record. Created automatically on submit.

name: Loan Application-vk_auto_approved
label: Auto-Approved
description: Set by the rules engine if all auto-approval criteria pass.

name: Loan Application-vk_loan_security_fee
label: Loan Security Fee (Quote)
description: One-time security fee quoted at application stage. At disbursement, record via Loan Charges table on the Loan.

name: Loan Application-vk_borrower_portal_ref
label: Borrower Portal Reference
description: Reference token for portal self-service session.

name: Loan-vk_due_date
label: Payday Due Date
description: Payday-resolved due date. Copied from Loan Application on creation.

name: Loan-vk_disbursement_source
label: Primary Disbursement Source
description: Primary Loan Disbursement Source record tracking M-Pesa transfer details.

name: Loan-vk_repayment_paybill_ref
label: Repayment Paybill Reference
description: The paybill account reference the borrower uses to repay.

name: Loan-vk_accrual_cap
label: Interest Accrual Cap
description: Kenyan legal cap: principal × 2. Interest accrual stops when this ceiling is reached.

name: Loan-vk_borrower_category
label: Borrower Category
description: Assigned based on repayment history. Drives auto-approval eligibility.

name: Loan-vk_refinancing_of
label: Refinancing Of (Prior Loan)
description: If this loan was created to pay off a prior loan, link to the original.

name: Loan-vk_repayment_reconciliation
label: Repayment Reconciliation
description: Linked reconciliation record tracking expected vs received repayment.

name: Loan Application-vk_loan_stage
label: Loan Stage
options:
Draft
Intake
Refinancing Requested
Pending KYC Verification
Gate Check
Lender Review
Pending Appraisal
Standard Review
Appraisal Complete
Review Required
Pending Lender Confirm
Refinancing Approved
New Loan Calculation
Approved
Declined
Refinancing Declined
Duplicate - Review
Pending Agreement Signing
Agreement Signed
Confirmed for Disbursement
Pending Disbursement
Disbursed
Active
Repaid
description: Programmatic workflow stage. Controlled by event hooks and API actions.

name: Loan Application-vk_is_repeat_borrower
label: Repeat Borrower
description: Set automatically on submit. 1 if borrower has an active Framework Agreement.

name: Loan Application-vk_is_refinancing
label: Is Refinancing
description: Tick this before submitting if the borrower is requesting refinancing of an existing loan.

name: Loan Application-vk_refinancing_of_loan
label: Refinancing Of (Loan)
description: For WF-03: the active loan being rolled over. Required when Is Refinancing is ticked.

name: Loan Application-vk_top_up_amount
label: Top-Up Amount
description: For WF-03: additional cash the borrower wants above the outstanding roll-over balance.

name: Loan Application-vk_rejection_reason
label: Rejection / Decline Reason
description: Populated by lender when declining. Sent to borrower via email.

name: Loan Application-vk_decision_notes
label: Decision / Override Notes
description: Lender's override or review notes. Required when overriding appraisal recommendation.

name: Loan Application-vk_has_framework_agreement
label: Has Framework Agreement
description: Set programmatically. 1 if borrower has an active Framework Agreement at time of application.

name: Loan Application-vk_clean_repayment_history
label: Clean Repayment History
description: Set programmatically. 1 if borrower has no overdue repayments on recent loans.

name: Repayment Reconciliation-vk_collections_stage
label: Collections Stage
options:
Pending Review
Collections Active
Partially Paid
Promise to Pay
Escalated
Paid
Recovered
Written Off
description: Collections lifecycle stage. Auto-entered on overdue detection; advanced by lender actions.

name: Repayment Reconciliation-vk_promise_date
label: Promise-to-Pay Date
description: Date the borrower has committed to making payment. Required before Log Promise to Pay.

name: Repayment Reconciliation-vk_promise_amount
label: Promised Amount
description: Amount the borrower has committed to pay.

name: Repayment Reconciliation-vk_escalation_reason
label: Escalation Reason
description: Required when escalating to formal recovery. Documents grounds for escalation.

name: Repayment Reconciliation-vk_recovery_date
label: Recovery Date
description: Date on which the outstanding balance was recovered post-escalation.

name: Repayment Reconciliation-vk_recovery_amount
label: Recovered Amount
description: Amount recovered through the formal collections/escalation process.

name: Repayment Reconciliation-vk_recovery_notes
label: Recovery Notes
description: Notes on the recovery process (method, agent, circumstances).

name: Repayment Reconciliation-vk_write_off_reason
label: Write-Off Reason
description: Required when writing off a loan balance.

name: Repayment Reconciliation-vk_contact_log
label: Collections Contact Log
description: JSON-backed log of contact attempts during collections. Managed via form buttons.

name: Loan Application-vk_borrower_email
label: Borrower Email
description: Fetched from Customer email_id. Used as Frappe Notification receiver field.
